ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Asian Paints Limited has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons, effective June 19, 2026, until two trading days after the declaration of its Q1 2026 financial results. This is a routine regulatory compliance measure designed to prevent insider trading prior to the upcoming earnings announcement. The document signals the impending release of the company's quarterly financial performance and presents no red flags, reflecting standard corporate governance practices.
